prompt_text:
### Demographics: 60-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Body mass index category: Normal
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 49.6 kg; Height 160.8 cm; BMI 19.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 117/75 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.6%; 9 months ago 9.2%; 6 months ago 9.7%; 3 months ago 10.0%; current 9.3%), FPG (12 months ago 238mg/dL; 9 months ago 220mg/dL; 6 months ago 239mg/dL; 3 months ago 216mg/dL; current 219mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 48.8kg; 9 months ago 48.9kg; 6 months ago 47.7kg; 3 months ago 47.3kg; current 49.6kg), Height (12 months ago 160.8cm; 9 months ago 160.8cm; 6 months ago 160.8cm; 3 months ago 160.8cm; current 160.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 19.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 117mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 71mmHg; 9 months ago 73mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 73mmHg; current 75mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 23U/L; 6 months ago 21U/L; 3 months ago 23U/L; current 17U/L), AST (12 months ago 31U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 27U/L; 3 months ago 31U/L; current 27U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; current 21mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 214mg/g; 9 months ago 296mg/g; 6 months ago 301mg/g; 3 months ago 324mg/g; current 297mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 78mg/dL; 9 months ago 81mg/dL; 6 months ago 81mg/dL; 3 months ago 77mg/dL; current 80mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 61mg/dL; 9 months ago 61mg/dL; 6 months ago 61mg/dL; 3 months ago 61mg/dL; current 60mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 106mg/dL; 9 months ago 124mg/dL; 6 months ago 129mg/dL; 3 months ago 129mg/dL; current 118mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.60 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
